context.audience: European SaaS founders, developers at companies handling EU user data, CTOs navigating privacy law for the first time
pain_points: Understanding which user data requires explicit consent vs. legitimate interest
Implementing a cookie consent banner that is actually GDPR-compliant
Choosing analytics tools that don't require consent banners
Data deletion workflows that satisfy right-to-erasure requests
Cross-border data transfer restrictions after Schrems II
content_that_works: Analytics tool comparisons focused on privacy
Legal plain-English explanations of GDPR requirements
